name: What do I do right now if a law firm in LA referred me using AI and now my settlement sucks?
description: Document all details, demand records, and hire a malpractice lawyer ASAP in CA.

mainEntity.name: What do I do right now if a law firm in LA referred me using AI and now my settlement sucks?

acceptedAnswer.text: Document all details, demand records, and hire a malpractice lawyer ASAP in CA.
acceptedAnswer.description: Immediately document everything and request a full explanation from the firm in writing. In California, demand records of the AI referral process to check for errors. Key factors: (1) AI inaccuracies in case assessment; (2) Breach of fiduciary duty; (3) Quantifiable losses like lower settlement. Preserve emails, AI outputs if shared. Contact a new attorney specializing in legal malpractice within 1 year of discovery; avoid signing releases.
